name: CareerOneStop Scholarship Finder
search_tips: Search by award type, degree level, and keyword.
Open promising results on the official provider page before applying.

name: College Board BigFuture Scholarship Search
search_tips: Use profile filters to narrow results.
Check whether each award accepts your education level.

name: InternationalStudent.com Scholarships
search_tips: Search by country of study.
Confirm whether graduate students are eligible on the sponsor page.

name: IEFA
search_tips: Use country and field filters.
Check whether the award supports students already enrolled abroad.

name: ProFellow
search_tips: Search by discipline and career goal.
Look for dissertation, research, and professional development fellowships.

name: Opportunity Desk
search_tips: Search by deadline and region.
Verify every opportunity on the official organizer page.

name: NSF Graduate Research Fellowship Program
deadline_window: Fall cycle; exact deadlines vary by field
status_note: Official GRFP page; verify the current solicitation, eligible fields, and deadline dates before applying.
search_tips: Best fit when the profile shows research plans or STEM/social science graduate study.
Use the official solicitation to confirm citizenship and field rules.

name: SMART Scholarship-for-Service Program
award_amount: Tuition support, stipend, internships, and post-graduation employment pathway
deadline_window: Annual application cycle; verify current dates
status_note: Official SMART page; confirm citizenship, STEM discipline, and service commitment rules.
search_tips: Use for STEM profiles interested in funded study plus government service.
Paste the official page into Step 4 before deciding fit.

name: DOE Computational Science Graduate Fellowship
award_amount: $45,000 annual stipend plus tuition and fees
deadline_window: Fall/Winter cycle; verify current application dates
status_note: Official DOE CSGF page; verify current eligibility and application cycle.
search_tips: Strong lead for computational STEM profiles preparing for doctoral study.
Check whether the student's research uses advanced computing or quantitative modeling.

name: NDSEG Fellowship
award_amount: Multi-year fellowship support; verify current award terms
status_note: Official NDSEG page; confirm citizenship, discipline, and doctoral enrollment rules.
search_tips: Prioritize for domestic STEM graduate or PhD profiles.
Use Step 4 to extract the current award terms and deadlines.

name: Society of Women Engineers Scholarships
deadline_window: Annual cycles; dates vary by student level
status_note: Official SWE scholarship page; confirm membership, gender, school, and location requirements for each award.
search_tips: Best when the profile indicates engineering, computing, or SWE-aligned identity/context.
Use filters on the official page and extract the exact award before analyzing fit.

name: SHPE ScholarSHPE
deadline_window: Annual scholarship cycle; verify current dates
status_note: Official SHPE page; confirm SHPE membership, heritage, enrollment, and field rules.
search_tips: Use when the profile indicates Hispanic/Latino background and STEM education.
Extract exact scholarship requirements before fit analysis.

name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund Scholar Program
status_note: Official HSF page; confirm Hispanic heritage, citizenship/residency, GPA, and enrollment rules.
search_tips: Use only when the profile supports Hispanic/Latino eligibility.
Paste the official page into Step 4 for exact requirements.

name: The Gates Scholarship
award_amount: Cost of attendance support not already covered by other aid
status_note: Official Gates Scholarship page; confirm current eligibility, Pell, GPA, and citizenship rules.
search_tips: Use for high school profiles with strong academics and need indicators.
Extract the official requirements before fit analysis.

name: Coca-Cola Scholars Program
deadline_window: Annual high school senior cycle; verify current dates
status_note: Official Coca-Cola Scholars page; confirm current senior-year eligibility and deadlines.
search_tips: Use for domestic high school profiles with leadership and service evidence.
Send the official page to Step 4 for current requirements.

name: MPOWER Global Citizen Scholarship
status_note: Official MPOWER scholarship page; confirm school, visa, and program eligibility.
search_tips: Use for profiles marked international or DACA/visa status.
Extract the specific MPOWER scholarship before analyzing fit.

name: AAUW International Fellowships
best_for: Graduate study in the United States
status_note: Official AAUW page; confirm citizenship, gender, location, degree, and return-intent rules.
search_tips: Use when the profile is international and graduate-level.
Paste the official page into the extractor before deciding fit.

name: P.E.O. International Peace Scholarship
best_for: Graduate study in the United States or Canada
award_amount: Up to a stated maximum; verify current amount on official page
status_note: Official P.E.O. page; confirm gender, international status, enrollment, and location rules.
search_tips: Use for international graduate profiles studying in the U.S. or Canada.
Extract exact eligibility and award terms in Step 4.

name: Google PhD Fellowship Program
award_amount: Fellowship award terms vary by region; verify current official details
deadline_window: Annual nomination/application cycle; verify current dates
status_note: Official Google Research page; confirm eligible research areas, university nomination rules, and regional requirements.
search_tips: Use for PhD profiles in computing, AI, data, systems, or adjacent quantitative research.
Extract the official page in Step 4 because region rules can differ.

name: Microsoft Research PhD Fellowship
award_amount: Fellowship support; verify current award amount and benefits on the official page
status_note: Official Microsoft Research page; confirm eligible universities, regions, research areas, and nomination rules.

Send the official page to Step 4 before analyzing fit.

name: GEM Fellowship Program

status_note: Official GEM page; confirm citizenship, underrepresented status, degree objective, and field rules.
